payload.source_name: 14th Street Transit & Truck Priority Pilot Project Brochure
payload.description: Informational brochure describing the 14th Street Transit & Truck Priority Pilot Project regulations, FAQ, and access instructions for eastbound and westbound travel.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Learn more at nyc.gov/betterbuses Contact: 14StTTP@dot.nyc.gov 212.839.6210

tool_args.label: 14th Street Transit & Truck Priority Pilot Project

payload.project_name: 14th Street Transit & Truck Priority Pilot Project
payload.description: 18-month pilot project making 14th Street between 9th Avenue and 3rd Avenue a Transit & Truck Priority corridor starting October 3, 2019.
goals: Increase speeds and reliability for M14 A/D Select Bus Service
Improve safety along a Vision Zero Priority corridor

evidence_refs.source_quote: On October 3, 2019, 14th Street between 9th Avenue and 3rd Avenue will become a Transit & Truck Priority corridor as part of an 18-month pilot project
Increase speeds and reliability for M14 A/D Select Bus Service ■ Improve safety along a Vision Zero Priority corridor

payload.description: 14th Street between 9th Avenue and 3rd Avenue designated as a Transit & Truck Priority corridor for an 18-month pilot project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 14th Street between 9th Avenue and 3rd Avenue will become a Transit & Truck Priority corridor
14th Street Transit & Truck Priority Pilot Project 9th Avenue to 3rd Avenue

payload.description: Select Bus Service routes operating on 14th Street, a target of the Transit & Truck Priority pilot project to increase speeds and reliability.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M14 A/D Select Bus Service

payload.description: Start date for the 14th Street Transit & Truck Priority Pilot Project 18-month pilot

evidence_refs.source_quote: On October 3, 2019, 14th Street between 9th Avenue and 3rd Avenue will become a Transit & Truck Priority corridor
Begins October 3, 2019

payload.description: 6am-10pm: Only buses and trucks may make through trips between 9th Avenue and 3rd Avenue. All other vehicles may make local trips to access the curb and garages but must turn at the next available right.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Only buses and trucks may make through trips between 9th Avenue and 3rd Avenue.
All other vehicles may make local trips to access the curb and garages, but must turn at the next available right.

payload.description: 10pm-6am: All vehicles may make through trips along the corridor. No Parking regulations allow expeditious loading and unloading.

evidence_refs.source_quote: All vehicles may make through trips along the corridor.
No Parking regulations allow expeditious loading and unloading along the corridor.

payload.description: All vehicles are restricted from making left turns off of 14th Street at all times (except MTA buses at signed locations). Also, no left turn onto 14th Street from 4th Avenue.

evidence_refs.source_quote: All vehicles are restricted from making left turns off of 14th Street (except MTA buses at signed locations).
No Left Turn onto 14th Street from 4th Avenue
Left turns will not be allowed off of 14th Street between 9th Avenue and 3rd Avenue.

payload.description: Commercial vehicles may load and unload in short-term metered loading zones along the corridor every day from 6am to 10pm. Meters are in effect Monday to Saturday.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Commercial vehicles may load and unload in short-term metered loading zones.
Short-term loading zones are provided along the corridor every day from 6 am to 10 pm; meters are in effect Monday to Saturday.

payload.description: Passenger vehicles may drop-off and pickup all along the corridor. Drivers are responsible for following traffic rules.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Passenger vehicles may drop-off and pickup all along the corridor.
Pickups and drop-offs are allowed throughout the corridor; drivers are responsible for following traffic rules.

payload.description: Restrictions are enforced through automated cameras along 14th Street. Automated cameras may only be used for bus lane enforcement.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Restrictions are enforced through automated cameras along 14th Street. NYPD traffic agents may also issue summonses.
Curb regulations are enforced by NYPD traffic agents; automated cameras may only be used for bus lane enforcement.

payload.description: NYPD traffic agents may issue summonses for Transit & Truck Priority restrictions and enforce curb regulations.

evidence_refs.source_quote: NYPD traffic agents may also issue summonses.
Curb regulations are enforced by NYPD traffic agents

columns: Must turn right to exit on

evidence_refs.source_quote: If you enter 14th Street from: You must turn right to exit on: 10th Avenue Washington Street or Hudson Street 9th Avenue 7th Avenue 8th Avenue 7th Avenue 7th Avenue 5th Avenue 6th Avenue 5th Avenue 5th Avenue University Place 4th Avenue 3rd Avenue

columns: Must turn right to exit on

evidence_refs.source_quote: If you enter 14th Street from: You must turn right to exit on: 3rd Avenue Irving Place Irving Place Union Square East Union Square East 6th Avenue 5th Avenue 6th Avenue 6th Avenue 8th Avenue 7th Avenue 8th Avenue

payload.claim_text: Data on bus performance, safety, parking, traffic, trucks, and pedestrians will be collected and publicly reported regularly. Community engagement will enable public input.
payload.description: NYC DOT committed to monitoring and public reporting during the pilot project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Data on bus performance, safety, parking, traffic, trucks, and pedestrians will be collected and publicly reported regularly. Community engagement will enable public input.

payload.claim_text: Any vehicle that has more than two axles OR six or more wheels is considered a truck.
payload.description: Definition of truck for the purposes of the Transit & Truck Priority corridor regulations.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Any vehicle that has more than two axles OR six or more wheels is considered a truck.

payload.claim_text: 14th Street is a designated truck route. Allowing trucks helps to limit truck traffic on side streets.
payload.description: Rationale for allowing trucks on the Transit & Truck Priority corridor.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 14th Street is a designated truck route. Allowing trucks helps to limit truck traffic on side streets.

payload.claim_text: Left turn bans keep buses from getting stuck behind turning vehicles and increase pedestrian safety; left turns are associated with high rates of pedestrian injuries.
payload.description: Rationale for the left turn ban on 14th Street between 9th Avenue and 3rd Avenue.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Left turn bans keep buses from getting stuck behind turning vehicles and increase pedestrian safety; left turns are associated with high rates of pedestrian injuries.

payload.description: The 14th Street Transit & Truck Priority Pilot Project designates the 14th Street corridor between 9th Avenue and 3rd Avenue as the pilot corridor.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 14th Street between 9th Avenue and 3rd Avenue will become a Transit & Truck Priority corridor as part of an 18-month pilot project

payload.description: The pilot project started on October 3, 2019.
The corridor has a through-trip restriction from 6am-10pm allowing only buses and trucks.
The corridor allows all vehicles to make through trips from 10pm-6am.
The corridor restricts left turns off 14th Street at all times.
The corridor has short-term metered loading zones for commercial vehicles.
The corridor allows passenger drop-off and pickup all along.
The corridor is enforced through automated cameras.
The corridor is enforced by NYPD traffic agents.

payload.entity_name: New York City Department of Transportation
payload.description: Publisher of the 14th Street Busway brochure and lead agency for the Transit & Truck Priority Pilot Project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Learn more at nyc.gov/betterbuses Contact: 14StTTP@dot.nyc.gov 212.839.6210

payload.description: Operator of M14 A/D Select Bus Service and beneficiary of the left turn exception for MTA buses at signed locations.

evidence_refs.source_quote: All vehicles are restricted from making left turns off of 14th Street (except MTA buses at signed locations).

payload.description: Enforces Transit & Truck Priority restrictions and curb regulations via traffic agents.

evidence_refs.source_quote: NYPD traffic agents may also issue summonses.
Curb regulations are enforced by NYPD traffic agents

payload.description: NYC DOT is the lead agency for the 14th Street Transit & Truck Priority Pilot Project.
MTA New York City Transit operates the M14 A/D Select Bus Service on 14th Street.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M14 A/D Select Bus Service

payload.claim_text: Eastbound map shows permitted (green arrows) and required (blue arrows) access directions to the south curb. Westbound map shows same scheme to the north curb. A 'Buses & Thru Trucks Only' zone is marked between 4th Ave and 3rd Ave.
payload.description: Map-based access instructions for eastbound and westbound 14th Street during restricted hours.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The map shows eastbound 14th Street with permitted (green) and required (blue) access directions.
The map shows westbound 14th Street with permitted (green) and required (blue) access directions.
A 'Buses & Thru Trucks Only' zone is marked between 4th Ave and 3rd Ave.
